onClick:
{{
  !selContactCustomer.selectedOptionValue
    ? showAlert("Customer is required.", "warning")
    : !inpContactName.text || !inpContactName.text.trim()
      ? showAlert("Contact name is required.", "warning")
      : (
          appsmith.store.contact_form_mode === "edit"
            ? updateContact.run()
            : saveContact.run()
        )
          .then(() => getContacts.run())
          .then(() => storeValue("contact_form_mode", "add"))
          .then(() => storeValue("current_contact_id", null))
          .then(() => resetWidget("mdlContact", true))
          .then(() => showAlert("Contact saved. Ready for next contact.", "success"))
}}
